description: Original high-resolution Lantau poster-map themes generated from official terrain/trail data. They are inspired by the broad typographic island-map poster category, not copied from Tiny Island Maps.

source_data.name: Lands Department 5 m-grid Digital Terrain Model
Official Lantau Trail section geometries extracted from hiking.gov.hk pages

notes: Generated as PNG/PDF/SVG at high resolution. Use as concept drafts; refine typography/labels before commercial printing.
